global.description: The ad features a light gray background with promotional text and a discount badge.
global.main_message: Promoting limited stock and free shipping with a discount offer.

elements.label: Light gray background
elements.description: A smooth light gray background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: BoltCart logo
elements.description: A simple, bold logo featuring the text 'BoltCart' in a prominent position at the top center.

elements.label: Empty space
elements.description: A rectangular area with no visible content, positioned in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Empty circles
elements.description: Two empty circular shapes located below the central area, suggesting placeholders for images or icons.

elements.label: Promotional text
elements.description: Bold text stating 'Limited stock Free shipping over $25' in the center of the ad, conveying a promotional message.

elements.label: Discount badge
elements.description: A bold '-30%' text in a prominent position at the bottom, indicating a discount offer.

elements.label: Brand name
elements.description: The brand name 'BoltCart' displayed prominently at the top of the ad in a clear, bold font.

elements.label: Uic placeholder
elements.description: A small placeholder labeled 'Uic' positioned at the top left, possibly indicating an app screenshot or icon.
